basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI)
basic_details.short_information: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) Recruitment 2026: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute has released the official notification for 1 Senior Project Associate posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. Environmental Engineering / Chemical Engg. / Environmental Science/ Chemistry / Environmental Chemistry from a recognized University AND 2 years’ experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organization and Scientific activities and services
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Environmental Engineering / Chemical Engineering / Environmental Science / Chemistry / Environmental Chemistry from a recognized University. 2 years of experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organization and Scientific activities and services.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NEERI Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 11th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Environmental Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Environmental Science, Chemistry, or Environmental Chemistry from a recognized university, along with 2 years of relevant research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Project Associate post is 40 years. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Project Associate post will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the type of job offered by CSIR NEERI?
faq.answer: The job offered is contractual in nature for the Senior Project Associate position.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the CSIR NEERI located?
faq.answer: CSIR NEERI is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440020.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. However, it's advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of CSIR NEERI is also provided.
